title: Federation
subtitle: A2A workstations — remotely controlled agent systems
info_p2: . The token is the target workstation's

workstation.no_card: No A2A card — please check token and click Refresh
workstation.tls_on_title: Currently ON — TLS certificate chain is validated. Click to disable (only useful for self-signed peers on LAN/Tailnet).
workstation.tls_off_title: Currently OFF — certificate is NOT verified. Only safe on trusted networks (LAN, Tailnet). Click to enable verification again.

add_dialog.title: Add workstation
add_dialog.subtitle: Register an A2A-compatible workstation
add_dialog.tls_hint: Off for self-signed setups (ProjektX --tls-auto, Tailnet, LAN). On for real CA-signed peers over public internet.
add_dialog.tls_warn: ⚠ This URL looks like LAN/Tailnet — TLS verify is probably why the card is unreachable. Uncheck?

clients.title: Connected clients
clients.subtitle: Config files for ProjektX and other clients
clients.delete_confirm: Remove client "{{name}}"? The API key will be revoked.

new_client.title: Connect new client
new_client.hint: Each client gets its own API key. The key is shown only once — cannot be retrieved after download.
new_client.success_suffix: generated. Download the file now — the API key cannot be retrieved afterwards.

instances.title: Datamining instances
instances.subtitle: External Claude Code instances mirroring live into datamining
instances.delete_confirm: Delete instance "{{name}}"? User, agent and API key will be removed.
instances.rotate_confirm: Rotate key for "{{name}}"? The old key will be invalidated.

new_instance.title: New datamining instance
new_instance.hint: Creates user + agent + API key. The key is shown only once.
new_instance.success_suffix: created. Copy the block now — the API key will not be shown again.
